title: CSS Mastery
description: Evaluate your skills in modern CSS layouts, Flexbox, and Grid.

questions.question: Which CSS property is used in Flexbox to justify items along the main axis?
questions.explanation: The justify-content property aligns flexible container's items when the items do not use all available space on the main-axis.

questions.question: What is the default display value of a <div> element?
questions.explanation: A <div> element is a block-level element, which means it starts on a new line and takes up the full width available (display: block).

questions.question: How do you specify a grid container in CSS Grid?
questions.explanation: To make an element a grid container, you apply 'display: grid;' or 'display: inline-grid;' to it.
